privileged_info_summary: The task requires encrypting a synthetically generated SQLite database (100 records) at '/home/ga/LegacyCRM/data/customers.db' via a symbolic link. The target container path ('/home/ga/Volumes/crm_encrypted.hc') and mount point ('/home/ga/MountPoints/secure_store') are explicitly verified by the export scripts. The requested volume size (50MB) and password ('Compliance2024!') are mandated via task instructions but ignored by the underlying programmatic verifier.
